name: Ultimate Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: General retail spends (excl. fuel and capped categories)

rewards.category: utilities, grocery, insurance, rent, education, government
rewards.displayCategory: Utility, supermarket, insurance, rent, school fees, and government spends

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per calendar quarter
international: 1 complimentary international lounge visit per month via Priority Pass, subject to a minimum spend of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
milestoneBenefits: 6,000 reward points (worth ₹6,000) on payment of joining fee
additionalBenefits: 5% cashback on duty-free spends (maximum ₹1,000 cashback per month)
1 complimentary golf game and 1 complimentary coaching session per month

redemption.ecosystemLabel: 360° Rewards Portal vouchers (1 point = ₹1, no statement cashback)

salaried: Minimum monthly income of ₹2,50,000 or self-declared high relationship value
selfEmployed: Minimum income or high relationship value

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.

Earns 5 reward points per ₹150 spent on base retail spends (3.33% return value). 1 point = ₹1 redeemable for vouchers/products via the 360 Rewards Portal only — there is no statement-credit/cashback redemption (₹99 + GST redemption fee).
Utility, supermarket, insurance, rent/property management, school/education, and government payments earn a lower rate of 3 reward points per ₹150 spent (2.0% return value).
Fuel spends are completely excluded from earning rewards.
International lounge access via Priority Pass requires a spend of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.
